name: Decrypto
description: Decrypto is Thomas Dagenais-Lespérance's brain-melting team code-breaking game — your team has four secret words on a hidden code-screen, each numbered 1–4, and the encryptor gives word-clues to transmit a three-digit sequence that teammates must decode. The catch: the opposing team is listening. Repeat patterns and they'll intercept your codes; throw them off and your own team gets lost. Codenames' devious cousin.
